tracks.meaning: a branch of study or course of instruction in a school or university
a person or entity that is under consideration, examination, or legal proceedings
an individual person or participant being studied or treated
a being or entity that experiences properties or performs actions
the part of a sentence about which something is affirmed or denied
the theme or main melodic line in a musical composition
to cause someone to experience or undergo something against their will
the material or substance that forms the base or foundation of something
a state, territory, or nation under the rule or dominion of another
a person who is submissive, obedient, or under someone's control
